set -e
cd $SLURM_SUBMIT_DIR
export PATH=/jet/home/aramamur/bin/Copasi/COPASI-4.34.251-Linux-64bit/bin:$PATH

echo "Job lifer_5XIHQG_Control_11 started"
startime=$(date +%s)
$PYTHON hybrid_run.py Arguments_lifer_5XIHQG_Control_11.json Run_Info_lifer_5XIHQG_Control.json
endtime=$(date +%s)

echo "Job lifer_5XIHQG_Control_11 ended"

set -e
cd $SLURM_SUBMIT_DIR
export PATH=/jet/home/aramamur/bin/Copasi/COPASI-4.34.251-Linux-64bit/bin:$PATH
